seed_instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same?
org_constraint: The email must include a bulleted list.
new_constraint: Avoid using bullet points in the email.
instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same? The email must include a bulleted list. Avoid using bullet points in the email.
response:
Subject: You're Invited to Our New Book Club!

Hi everyone,

I hope you are all having a wonderful week. I am writing to invite you to join me in starting a new book club with our group of friends. I think it would be a fantastic way to connect, share ideas, and enjoy some great stories together over coffee or tea.

Here are the details for our first meeting:

The first session will take place on Saturday at 2:00 PM at Sarah's house. We will be discussing the novel "The Midnight Library" by Matt Haig, which I believe will spark some interesting conversations. Please let me know by next Friday if you can make it so I can finalize the headcount and order snacks. If you have any book recommendations you would like to discuss in the future, feel free to send them my way as well.

I really hope you can join us for this fun new adventure.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
